Change in reporting data: We've updated our acquisition and install metrics to:
  • include all account types, such as supervised and enterprise accounts
  • filter out more spam accounts
  • more accurately count devices with multiple users
  • more accurately count users with multiple devices
  • better detect device deactivations and reactivations
You may see a change in your metrics from this date as a result of this update.
